---
title: "About"
toc: false
---

## Sources

- **BHB** — National Library of Israel, Bibliography of the Hebrew Book project (`mbimarc-bhb.tsv`, 107,977 MARC records; this dashboard uses the 10,787-record subset, 008-Year ≤ 1800).
- **DiJeSt** — Digital Jewish Studies; place-data mapping and KIMA alignment of the BHB; the original [Looker Studio dashboard](https://datastudio.google.com/u/0/reporting/73a17dcc-f092-4dec-8c57-58b606862b2d/page/FPCXD). Project led by Sinai Rusinek; Looker Studio by Sharon Kurant.
- **KIMA** — Historical Gazetteer of Place Names in the Hebrew Script.

## Build

- Quarto static site, deployed via GitHub Actions to GitHub Pages.
- Extraction: [`scripts/extract_in_scope.py`](https://github.com/sinairusinek/Margins/blob/main/dashboard/scripts/extract_in_scope.py).
- Sanity check (locks dashboard ↔ methods doc): [`scripts/sanity_check.py`](https://github.com/sinairusinek/Margins/blob/main/dashboard/scripts/sanity_check.py).

## Citing

Cite DiJeSt, KIMA, and the Bibliography of the Hebrew Book first.
